content:
Delighted to receive this Certificate of Participation from Law Jurist for attending the webinar on "Understanding Anti-Money Laundering Laws: From Enforcement Actions to Courtroom Advocacy."
I sincerely thank Shachi Kothari for sharing her valuable insights and practical perspective on this important area of law. I also appreciate the Law Jurist team for organizing such an informative session.
